common.tagline: Flags you can raise with a clear conscience

hero.title: Flags that don't cost the earth
hero.lead: From mast flags to beach flags: printed on recycled and biodegradable materials, produced in Europe with green energy.

european.title: European production
european.body: Short transport routes, produced with green energy.

quality.title: Sharp quality
quality.body: Vivid colours that stand up to wind and weather.

delivery.title: Fast delivery
delivery.body: Made to order and delivered within 1.5 weeks.

product.uploadHint: Drag your file here or click to browse (PDF, PNG, SVG).

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.sameAsBilling: Shipping address is the same as billing address

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.postalCodeInvalid: Please enter a valid postal code.
validation.vatNumberInvalid: Please enter a valid VAT number.
validation.vatNumberNotVerified: This VAT number could not be verified.

confirmation.title: Thank you for your order
confirmation.subtitle: We've received your order and are getting started right away.
confirmation.emailSent: A confirmation has been sent to {email}.
confirmation.pendingTitle: Your order is ready to go
confirmation.pendingSubtitle: We have received your order. As soon as your payment comes through, we get started.
confirmation.problemTitle: Your payment did not go through
confirmation.problemSubtitle: No worries, your order is still waiting for you. Try the payment again and we will get started.
confirmation.trackPromise: Once we have processed your order, you will receive a track & trace link by email. It lets you follow your flags right to your door.

steps.heading: What happens next
steps.paidBody: Your order is confirmed and scheduled with us.
steps.productionBody: We print your flags and finish them exactly as you configured them.
steps.shippedBody: You will receive your track & trace link by email as soon as the parcel is ready.

portal.pending: We are still missing {count} design(s) for your order. Deliver them whenever suits you.

company.title: Sustainable Flags
company.description: Sustainable flags for businesses and events, produced in Europe.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.paymentFailed: The payment failed. Please try again.
errors.designsIncomplete: Not every flag has a design yet. Assign all designs first or choose “deliver later”.
